// Legacy ProffieOS — 6-color rainbow Stripes with WHITE shimmer + 300/800 ignite/retract
// Stripes<width,scroll,c1,c2,c3,c4,c5,c6> shape — common alternative to Rainbow<>
StyleNormalPtr<Stripes<1000,1000,RED,GREEN,BLUE,CYAN,YELLOW,MAGENTA>,WHITE,300,800>()
